Interface IComputeChangeFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Compute Change function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FFEB7F86-181E-4029-B36B-C5DC5F3D1DAF")]
public interface IComputeChangeFunctionArguments2 : IComputeChangeFunctionArguments

The different ways for estimating cellsize.

esriCellsizeType CellsizeType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriCellsizeType

ExtentType

The different ways for estimating extent.

esriExtentType ExtentType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriExtentType

Sample Snippet

FromClassValues

The list of class values to be selected from the from raster. Empty means all classes.

ILongArray FromClassValues { get; set; }

Property Value

ILongArray

The Compute Change Keep Method.

esriComputeChangeKeepMethod KeepMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriComputeChangeKeepMethod
